Footer.all_rights_reserved: Full Guide Azerbaijan. All rights reserved

Home.popular_description: Recommended destinations loved by thousands of travelers.
Home.easy_discover: Discovering Azerbaijan with FullGuide has never been easier.
Home.expert_guide_desc: An unforgettable Azerbaijan experience with our expert guides.
Home.choose_place_desc: Find the destination that suits your dreams among 400+ unique places. Mountains, cities, historical sites — the choice is yours.
Home.plan_desc: Plan your route with the interactive map, reserve hotels and tours. Everything in one place.
Home.travel_desc: Discover Azerbaijan yourself with prepared guides, local tips, and live support.
Home.share_experience_desc: Rate your trip, add your photos and inspire other travelers.
Home.baku_desc: The capital of Azerbaijan, it is the largest industrial, scientific and cultural center located on the coast of the Caspian Sea.
Home.sheki_desc: One of the oldest cities of Azerbaijan, it is an architectural pearl located at the foot of the Greater Caucasus Mountains.
Home.qabala_desc: A modern tourism center, attracting travelers in every season with its nature and entertainment centers.
Home.lankaran_desc: A southern pearl famous for its subtropical climate, tea plantations, and golden sands of the Caspian Sea.
Home.shusha_desc: The cultural capital of Azerbaijan, considered the crown of Karabakh, a city distinguished by its unique air and history.
Home.default_map_desc: By selecting any region on the map, you can get acquainted with brief information and interesting facts about that place.
Home.default_famous: All regions have a unique landscape.
Home.travelers_experience_desc: Azerbaijan experience of visitors from all over the world.
Home.blog_desc: Travel guides, tips and inspirational stories written by local experts.
Home.newsletter_desc: New places, special discounts, local events and inspiring travel stories — subscribe to our monthly newsletter.
Home.no_spam: No spam. You can unsubscribe at any time.
Home.default_card_desc: Click for detailed information and to get acquainted with the possibilities of this venue.

HeroDefault.slide1_subtitle: Key to the East, Pearl of the Caucasus
HeroDefault.slide1_desc: From ancient city streets to glacial mountain peaks, rich culture to the shores of the Caspian — Azerbaijan will amaze you.
HeroDefault.slide1_c1_desc: Ancient Inner City, Flame Towers and modern architecture — Baku reveals new secrets every day.
HeroDefault.slide1_c2_desc: The beating heart of Karabakh, cradle of music and poetry, offers a journey through time.
HeroDefault.slide1_c3_desc: In the green lap of the Greater Caucasus: lakes, waterfalls, and Tufandag ski center — a paradise for all seasons.

PlacesPage.subtitle: Best places, hotels and restaurants in one place
PlacesPage.no_results_desc: No results matching your search criteria. Please try different keywords or clear the filters.
PlacesPage.restaurants_subtitle: The most popular and quality restaurants presenting the masterpieces of our national cuisine
PlacesPage.hotels_subtitle: The best hotels for a comfortable and unforgettable stay in Azerbaijan
PlacesPage.hostels_subtitle: Comfortable and affordable hostels for travelers
PlacesPage.landmarks_subtitle: Discover the rich history and unique architecture of Azerbaijan
PlacesPage.all_venues_subtitle: Every inch of Azerbaijan is a history, every corner is a miracle. Make your next trip stand out with us.

AirportInfo.title: Airport
AirportInfo.hero_desc: Heydar Aliyev International Airport (GYD) - One of the most advanced and modern airports in the CIS and the East.

cards.arrival_desc: The airport is located about 20 km east of the city center. You can reach the center comfortably in 25-30 minutes by taxi or express bus.
cards.express_desc: Operates every 30 minutes according to flight schedules. Transports passengers directly to Koroglu Metro and 28 May Central Station.
cards.important_desc: Duty Free shops, VIP lounges, free Wi-Fi (Baku Airport Free Wi-Fi) are available to all passengers. It is safer to use official taxis (Baku Taxi).

BakuInfo.hero_desc: Everything about Baku, the heart of the Land of Fire, and Azerbaijan's rich culture, history and modern life.
BakuInfo.history_desc: Azerbaijan has ancient sources and rich historical roots. As one of the important stops on the Silk Road, it has connected the East and the West for many centuries. Ancient Gobustan rocks and Momine Khatun tomb are just the beginning of this richness.
BakuInfo.modern_desc: Baku is one of the rare cities that perfectly matches the fortress walls of the Ancient Old City with the ultramodern Flame Towers. The harmony of skyscrapers built of glass and steel with historical palaces makes this place irreplaceable.
BakuInfo.fact_language_desc: Azerbaijani (Russian and English are widely spoken)
BakuInfo.fact_climate_desc: 9 out of 11 climate types existing in the country are found.

VenueDetail.not_found_desc: The venue you are looking for does not exist in our database or might have been deleted.
VenueDetail.no_description: Detailed information about this venue is being prepared.
VenueDetail.landmark_safety_desc: Please treat historical sites with respect while visiting. Tourist zones are protected 24/7 by police. For detailed information, you can contact official tourism information centers (TIC).
VenueDetail.hostel_safety_desc: All our hostels have been personally checked by the FGA team. Cleanliness, safety, and friendliness are our most important principles. Locked lockers for your personal belongings are available in every hostel.
VenueDetail.hotel_reservation_desc: All reservations you make through FGA are verified by our official partners and you are given the lowest price guarantee.
